# Data Retention and Deletion Policy

Policy governing retention periods and deletion requirements for company data.

Customer data retention is mandatory for 7 years under applicable regulations.
Employees must not delete records subject to legal hold or regulatory requirements.

## Retention Periods

- Customer contracts: 7 years minimum
- Financial records: 10 years minimum
- HR records: 5 years post-termination
- Email communications: 3 years
